title: guettarda roupaliifolia
intro: Guettarda roupaliifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the guettarda or velvet tree. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Caribbean, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant's health benefits include treating various ailments such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Guettarda roupaliifolia is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves are also used in folk medicine to make poultices and salves.
